summary: Blog platform with health remedies, skin care, and hair care sections, featuring blog posts with image upload capability and comment sharing functionality

existing_features.title: Add a comment section at the bottom of each blog post detail page that allows users to view and share comments
Add image upload capability to the blog post creation and editing forms, allowing authors to upload custom images instead of using image descriptions

new_feature_requests.summary: Add comment sharing section at bottom of blog posts
Add image upload option in blog post creation
Update the backend BlogPost data model to support storing comments with author name, comment text, and timestamp
Update the backend to handle image file uploads and storage for blog posts

projectName: Add comment section to blog posts and image upload for blog posts
